issues.title: Enemy dealt 34 dmg (100% of 34 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 2, turn 23 (seq 123), the enemy dealt 34 damage which is 100% of the player's 34 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 2 (bone_collector)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 1, encounter 2 against bone_collector (mini_boss). Accuracy was 46% with 23 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.

issues.title: HP crashed from 68 to 0 in floor 1 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 1, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 68 (85%) to 0 (0%). Going from >70% to <20% in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (85 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
